zh.title:
> search("你是专业的数字货币交易分析师。请对 雪崩币/美元(AVAX/USD) 进行技术分析。

当前市场数据：
- 最新价格: 9.1374
- 24小时变化: 0.37%
- 高点/低点: 9.1467 / 9.1005
- RSI(14): N/A
- MACD: -0.0070611852, Signal: N/A
- SMA(20): 9.10907

要求：
1. 第一行：完整的中文标题，格式："雪崩币/美元技术分析：[趋势描述]"
2. 然后空一行
3. 正文3-4段，每段60-80字，总共250-300字
4. 包含：趋势判断、技术指标解读、支撑/阻力位、交易建议
5. 使用专业术语但易于理解
6. 不要添加任何标签或额外说明

立即开始（第一行就是标题）：")
zh.content:
雪崩币/美元技术分析：盘整偏弱震荡格局

当前价格围绕中短期均线震荡，最新价在9.13附近徘徊，日内波动有限体现多空短期胶着。价格略高于20日简单移动均线(SMA)9.109，表明近期空头动力略有消退，但未形成明确上行突破。

MACD处于负值区域，虽未有Signal数据确认但柱状能量仍偏弱，暗示下跌动能尚未完全衰竭。RSI缺失数据限制超买超卖判断，但结合价格震荡可认为市场参与者观望情绪占优，趋势未确立方向。

关键支撑位可关注9.00整数关口及近期低点9.10附近，一旦破位可能加速空头；阻力则在9.20-9.25区间，突破该区或带动回踩整理。整体价格区间界定清晰，呈震荡整理特征。

交易上，可在接近支撑位尝试小额多单布局，止损设置在8.95下方；突破阻力并量能放大时可考虑顺势追多。保持仓位轻、耐心等待确认信号是当下较稳妥策略。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
> search("You are a professional cryptocurrency analyst. Provide technical analysis for Avalanche vs US Dollar (AVAX/USD).\n\nCurrent Market Data:\n- Latest Price: 9.1374\n- 24h Change: 0.37%\n- High/Low: 9.1467 / 9.1005\n- RSI(14): N/A\n- MACD: -0.0070611852, Signal: N/A\n- SMA(20): 9.10907\n\nRequirements:\n1. Write 3-4 paragraphs, 60-80 words each, total 250-300 words\n2. Include: trend analysis, indicator interpretation, support/resistance levels, trading suggestions\n3. Use professional but accessible language\n4. No labels, no meta-commentary\n5. Start immediately with the content (no title needed)\n\nBegin:")

Avalanche is currently trading in a tight consolidation zone around $9.13, reflecting a short-term sideways trend with mild bullish undertones. Price action hovering just above the 20-day moving average suggests stability, but not strong momentum. Broader context shows AVAX has been range-bound near the $9 level, indicating equilibrium between buyers and sellers after prior weakness . ThisAVAX Price Prediction: Targets $9.80 Resistance Test by ...](https://www.mexc.co/news/1021151?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *mexc.co*
> 3 days ago — AVAX price prediction shows neutral momentum at $9.05 with RSI at 47.37. Technical analysis suggests potential retest of $9.80 resistance within ...
. This places the market in a decision phase rather than a clear trend continuation.

From an indicator perspective, the slightly negative MACD reading points to lingering bearish pressurehough the absence of a strong signal line crossover suggests weakening downside momentum rather than active selling. RSI data is unavailable, but comparable recent readings in the mid-40s to high-40s range imply neutral conditions without overbought or oversold extremes . The[AVAX Price Prediction: Targets $9.80 Resistance Test by ...](https://www.mexc.co/news/1021151?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *MEXC*
> 3 days ago — AVAX price prediction shows neutral momentum at $9.05 with RSI at 47.37. Technical analysis suggests potential retest of $9.80 resistance within ...
. The SMA(20) sitting just below price reinforces a fragile bullish bias, but conviction remains limited.

Key levels are well-defined in this range-bound structure. Immediate support lies near $9.00–$8.65, a zone repeatedly defended by buyers in recent sessions . Resistance is clustered between $9.70 and $10.00, with stronger breakout confirmation likely above $10.50 . Failuret.com)** · *MEXC*
> 3 days ago — AVAX price prediction shows neutral momentum at $9.05 with RSI at 47.37. Technical analysis suggests potential retest of $9.80 resistance within ...
. Resistance is clustered between $9.70 and $10.00, with stronger breakout confirmation likely above $10.50 
> **[Avalanche (AVAX) Price Prediction For 2026 & Beyond](https://coinmarketcap.com/cmc-ai/avalanche/price-prediction/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *coinmarketcap.com*
> 21 hours ago — Overview: Technically, AVAX is testing a critical zone. The price faces immediate resistance at $9.70–$10.70; a daily close above $10.70 could ...Read more
. Failure to hold current support could expose downside toward the $8 region, while a sustained push above resistance may trigger momentum-driven upside expansion.

ing strategy favors patience and range-based positioning. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk controls, targeting the upper resistance band. Breakout traders should wait for confirmed closes above $9.70–$10.00 before entering long positions. Conversely, rejection near resistance could present short opportunities. Given the neutral-to-mixed signals, disciplined risk management is essential while the market awaits a clearer directional catalyst.
